featureName: BUG-059-001: gkeepapi live-mode dependency missing from ML sidecar build surfaces

scopeProgress.name: Pin gkeepapi on the build surface + structural guard test

blockers.summary: Maintainer supply-chain decision required before any fix code lands: which gkeepapi version to pin and acceptance of the reverse-engineered-library risk (design.md Open Question Q1). Fix intentionally deferred to a deliberate delivery pass; not a sweep-round drive-by.

executionHistory.summary: DEVOPS-059-A (stochastic-quality-sweep round 17/20): grep -rn gkeepapi ml/requirements.txt ml/pyproject.toml ml/Dockerfile exit 1 — live-mode dependency absent from all three build surfaces while ml/app/keep_bridge.py:72 imports it lazily. Orchestrator independently verified.

Fix DEFERRED: pinning a reverse-engineered Google library is a deliberate maintainer supply-chain decision (design.md Q1). Status set to blocked (triaged backlog awaiting maintainer decision + deliberate delivery pass). No fix code touched; parent spec 059 untouched (stays done).

notes: Tracked-work creation only. Fix deferred pending maintainer supply-chain decision (design.md Open Question Q1). DoD items intentionally unchecked (anti-fabrication, Gate G021). Parent spec 059 remains done and its protected artifacts are unchanged.
